user_request: Update system prompts, agent instructions, campaign briefs, and strategy rules based on detailed copy feedback (stop selling, start conversing; no timeframes; no links in steps 1-3; emphasize 'giving away' vs 'selling'; power-partner = recruiter-built stack given away to help industry survive AI; direct-value = recruiters helping recruiters implement AI + new revenue stream; capstone = one-call one-workflow rebuild, no timeline)
what_it_would_do: Accept campaign_name + updated markdown/JSON, rewrite data/campaigns/{name}/brief.md and core strategy/copy agent system prompts, so future launch_pilot runs use the new voice and rules.
workaround_used: Logged the gap; will ask dev to hand-edit the briefs and agent prompts, then re-run generate_preview_pack to show new samples.

user_request: Set it up so that every lead that doesn't respond gets added to the next campaign until they respond. That way one lead goes through at least three different campaigns.
what_it_would_do: Monitor reply status across campaigns and automatically add non-responders to subsequent campaigns in a defined sequence (e.g. power-partner → direct-value → capstone). Would require webhook/polling on Smartlead reply events + logic to enqueue leads into the next campaign after N days of no reply.
workaround_used: Manual: user pulls non-responders from campaign X via Smartlead UI or API after campaign completes, then re-ingests them into campaign Y. Or we build a poll-based tool that checks campaign status daily and moves leads forward.

user_request: Automatically move leads from one campaign to the next when they don't reply positively (waterfall sequencing). Tag leads with each campaign they've been through. Only stop the waterfall on positive replies; non-responses and "not interested" both continue to the next campaign.
what_it_would_do: Monitor reply sentiment per lead in real-time, auto-move non-responders and negative replies from campaign A → B → C, tag each lead with campaigns visited, halt only on positive reply detection.
workaround_used: Manual export from Smartlead after each campaign exhausts, filter out positive replies, re-import to next campaign with tags.
